LanguageData.NCL_ChargeA.label: 冲刺！冲!
LanguageData.NCL_ChargeA.description: Charge towards the target, push away all enemies along the path, and create an area effect at the target location.
LanguageData.NCL_ChargeB.label: 冲!冲刺！
LanguageData.NCL_ChargeB.description: Charge towards the target, push away all enemies along the path, and create an area effect at the target location.
